questions.question: What island did Paul and the others land on after the shipwreck?
What happened when Paul was bitten by a venomous snake on Malta?
options: He shook it off and was unharmed
questions.answer: He shook it off and was unharmed

questions.question: When Paul finally arrived in Rome, he was thrown into a dungeon.
Paul stayed two whole years in his own rented house in Rome, welcoming all who came to him, preaching the _____ of God.
The islanders expected Paul to swell up or suddenly fall down dead after the snake bite, but when nothing happened they said he was a _____.
